creator: mic6090@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 247068
poudriere log

database/mysql80-client doesn't build on i386. It breaks on patch phase:
===>  Patching for mysql80-client-8.0.35
===>  Applying extra patch /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-client/../mysql80-server/files/extra-patch-scripts_CMakeLists.txt
===>  Applying extra patch files/extra-patch-boost-boost_1_77_0-boost-move-detail-type_traits.hpp
cat: files/extra-patch-boost-boost_1_77_0-boost-move-detail-type_traits.hpp: No such file or directory
===>  FAILED Applying extra patch files/extra-patch-boost-boost_1_77_0-boost-move-detail-type_traits.hpp
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-client

Full poudriere log in attachment.

Fix is a one-line patch in /usr/ports/databases/mysql80-server/Makefile:
--- databases/mysql80-server/Makefile.orig      2023-12-15 22:21:19.825952000 +0700
+++ databases/mysql80-server/Makefile   2023-12-15 20:16:37.035586000 +0700
@@ -205,7 +205,7 @@

 # XXX MBi alignment issue
 .if ${ARCH} == i386
-EXTRA_PATCHES+=        files/extra-patch-boost-boost_1_77_0-boost-move-detail-type_traits.hpp
+EXTRA_PATCHES+=        ${PATCHDIR}/extra-patch-boost-boost_1_77_0-boost-move-detail-type_traits.hpp
 .endif

 .if !defined(CLIENT_ONLY)
